Hi,

Here is new port java/eclipse-yaml-editor. Port is very simple, uses no build, repack built jar files.

This is an Eclipse plugin to improve YAML editing. It's really fresh and good. 

Validated by:
 - portlint
 - portfmt
 - testport (on 14-CURRENT)

Thanks!
